regional_cost_note: Carpet layers in Hastings typically charge $60–$85/hr. Supply-and-lay carpet is usually quoted per m²: expect $35–$60/m² for mid-range carpet installed.

businesses.name: Plush Carpet Fitting
businesses.known_for: Specialist carpet fitter with 10+ years' experience in residential and commercial carpet and vinyl flooring across Hawke's Bay.

businesses.name: Kiwi Flooring Services Ltd
businesses.known_for: Carpet and flooring services across Hawke's Bay including Hastings, Napier, and Central Hawke's Bay.
